sources.2022-2024: Doi chieu thapdien.com (2024), doctailieu.com / bao chi (2022-2023) voi du lieu ts10.hcm.edu.vn
sources.priority_scores_2022_2025: ts10.hcm.edu.vn (truong hop da bo sung/sua theo bang chinh thuc tong hop)

meta.notes: Truong `scores` = diem chuan NV1. `priority_scores` = NV1/NV2/NV3; nam 2024 nhieu truong truoc day bi copy nham tu 2023 da duoc sua theo bang SGD cap nhat. `volatility` tinh lai tu `scores`.
